MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA'S Motion For Leave Of Court To File And Serve Its First Amended Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
